title: Section 3
content: In this Act-- 1* * * * * Banker.2[banker includes any person acting as a banker and any post office savings bank;] 3* * * * *
footnote: 1. Definition of the word India, which was subs. by Act 3 of 1951, for the definition of the word State, omitted by Act 62 of 1956, s. 2 and the Sch. 2. Subs. by Act 37 of 1955, s. 2, for the definition of the word banker. 3. Omitted by Act 53 of 1952, s. 16 (w.e.f. 14-2-1956).
